title: ジャパンカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa has finally reached the stage she
dreamed of from the very beginning... The Japan
Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her talent, confidence, and especially her desire
to entertain her fans is what got her here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She heads for the race, excited to face off against
Special Week and powerful athletes from abroad.
